auth.demoPasswordManaged: This is a shared demo environment. Demo account passwords are managed by the system.

drives.title: Drives
drives.placeholder: Drives view will be implemented in a future phase.
drives.searchPlaceholder: Search by device, path, project, or ID
drives.formatSubmitted: Drive format started. Drive Detail refreshes automatically until it completes.
drives.formatPending: Drive format is in progress. Drive actions stay disabled until formatting completes.
drives.formatFailed: Drive format failed. Review the drive status and retry.
drives.throughputTestFailed: Drive throughput test failed. Verify that the mounted drive is available and try again.
drives.enableSuccess: Port enabled. Drive is now available.
drives.enableInUse: Port enabled. Drive remains in use because it is already mounted.
drives.enableNoPort: Cannot enable: drive has no associated port.
drives.enablePortNotFound: Port not found. The port may have been removed or the drive re-seated.
drives.enablePending: Port enabled, but drive is still {state}. Discovery may still be in progress.
drives.formatConfirmBody: Formatting destroys all data on this drive.
drives.ejectConfirmBody: Ensure no active copy operation is running before eject.
drives.ejectIncompleteConfirmBody: This drive has timed-out or failed files in active assignments. Confirm to continue ejecting.
drives.ejectBlockedActiveJob: Cannot eject: copy job {jobId} has started and is not yet completed on this drive.
drives.ejectBlockedUnknownJob: Cannot eject: a started copy job on this drive is not yet completed.
drives.cocPrompt: Drive is ready for safe removal. Generate a chain-of-custody report and confirm handoff details.
drives.projectWarning: Project binding is enforced for all writes.
drives.initializeProjectHint: This drive was last used for project "{project}".
drives.initializeMountRequired: Mount this drive before confirming initialization.
drives.initializeNoProjects: No mounted shares have assigned projects. Add a mount first.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.placeholder: Jobs view will be implemented in a future phase.
jobs.dialogDescription: Select a project first to unlock the matching source and destination options.
jobs.discardCreateConfirmBody: Your unsaved Create Job entries will be lost.
jobs.notesHint: Optional operator notes for this job
jobs.insecureCallbackConfirmLabel: Allow an insecure HTTP callback URL for testing only
jobs.insecureCallbackConfirmHelp: HTTP callback URLs are for test and lab workflows only. Leave this unchecked for normal HTTPS webhook delivery.
jobs.insecureCallbackConfirmationRequired: Select the testing-only confirmation checkbox before saving an HTTP callback URL.
jobs.noProjectsAvailable: No mounted projects are available. Add and mount a project share first.
jobs.noEligibleDrives: No eligible mounted USB drives are available for the selected project.
jobs.noEligibleMounts: No mounted source shares are available for the selected project.
jobs.selectionUnavailable: The selected drive, overflow drive, or mount is no longer available for this project. Review the form and try again.
jobs.overlapConflictExact: A job is already copying from this exact source path to the selected drive (job #{jobId}).
jobs.overlapConflictAncestor: An existing job (#{jobId}) copies from a subdirectory of the requested source. The parent path would duplicate that content.
jobs.overlapConflictDescendant: An existing job (#{jobId}) already copies from a parent path that includes the requested source.
jobs.autoStartFailed: The job was created, but it could not be started automatically.
jobs.listUnavailable: Job listing endpoint is not available on this server version.
jobs.searchPlaceholder: Search by project, evidence, source path, or ID
jobs.overflowPanelHelp: Reserve additional mounted drives in the order they should receive overflow data. Reserved drives stay in use so they cannot be assigned elsewhere.
jobs.noEligibleOverflowDrives: No additional mounted USB drives are available to reserve for overflow.
jobs.sourcePathHint: Path inside the selected mount, for example: folder/subfolder
jobs.workflowTabCreateDescription: Set optional per-job copy tuning and workflow preferences before saving this job.
jobs.workflowTabCreateHelp: This tab starts with the live Configuration > Copy and Job Workflow values. Saving creates a per-job snapshot of the four tuning settings so later global Configuration changes do not alter jobs that already exist.
jobs.workflowTabEditHelp: Review or change this job's stored copy-tuning values. Saving updates only this job's snapshot and does not change global Configuration defaults or other jobs.
jobs.workflowTabLockedHelp: Started jobs keep project, source, primary destination, notes, and callback details fixed. Use this tab to adjust runtime tuning and reserved overflow drives.
jobs.autoApplyRecommendedProfileHint: When enabled, ECUBE applies the startup-analysis recommended workload profile for this job after startup analysis finishes.
jobs.editDialogDescription: Review or adjust this job before resuming or finishing the workflow.
jobs.archiveConfirmTitle: Archive this job without recording handoff?
jobs.archiveConfirmBodyLead: This action archives the job record and removes it from the normal active workflow.
jobs.archiveConfirmBodyRestore: Archived jobs remain viewable, but they cannot be restored from the UI.
jobs.archiveConfirmBodyNoHandoff: This action does not record chain of custody handoff.
jobs.archiveConfirmBodyUseHandoff: If the media is being transferred to another person or team, cancel this action and use Chain of Custody instead.
jobs.archiveRequiresEject: Prepare Eject the related drive before using Archive. Use the handoff workflow when the media is actually being transferred.
jobs.deleteConfirmBody: This removes the pending job and releases its current drive assignment. This action cannot be undone.
jobs.clearStartupAnalysisConfirmBody: This removes the cached startup scan for this job. The next restart will rescan the source before copy work begins.
jobs.startupAnalysisCompletedFromList: Startup analysis finished for job #{jobId} with status {status}.
jobs.pauseRequestedMessage: Waiting for active copy threads to finish the current work before the pause completes. Start will be available once the job is fully paused.
jobs.manifestDownloadFailed: Manifest download could not be started.
jobs.progressPreparingDetail: Scanning source files and calculating totals before copy work begins. This can take time for large evidence sets.
jobs.verificationProgressDetail: Verification checks are running. Exact verification progress is unavailable on this page.
jobs.failureReasonFallback: This job failed. Review the file status entries and logs for more details.
jobs.relatedLogEntryMissing: No matching line was found in the main application log for this failure. Older failures may not have a directly correlated log line yet.
jobs.overflowDialogDescription: Select a different mounted destination drive to continue this job after the current device filled or copy work stalled.
jobs.fileErrorDetailsEmpty: No file error details are available for this row.
jobs.hashViewerEmpty: Select a file to load hashes.
jobs.compareHelp: Select an exported file to compare its source version with the copied destination version.

shares.testSuccess: Share test passed. You can now save these changes.
shares.throughputTestFailed: Share throughput test failed. Verify that the mounted share is available and try again.
shares.updateFailed: Share update failed. Review the returned mount status before closing the dialog.

audit.title: Audit
audit.placeholder: Audit view will be implemented in a future phase.
audit.resultsSummary: Showing {shown} audit entries on this page out of {total} total.
audit.empty: No audit log entries are currently available.
audit.emptyFiltered: No audit log entries match the current filters.
audit.manifestTotalsFootnote: Manifest totals reflect files and bytes recorded for this drive assignment. When one job spans multiple drives, each drive section shows only the subset copied to that drive.
audit.cocEventsTableLabel: Chain of custody events for drive #{driveId} ({driveSn})
audit.handoffGuidance: Standard closeout is an in-app custody handoff. Record it in ECUBE even if external paper paperwork is also used.
audit.handoffWarningMessage: Use this flow to record custody transfer in ECUBE even when paper paperwork is also used. Confirming handoff records the transfer and refreshes the stored chain-of-custody snapshot for this job.
audit.handoffInvalid: Drive ID, possessor, and delivery time are required.
audit.cocSelectRequired: Select at least one filter (drive, serial number, or project) before loading the chain of custody.

system.threadTimelineDescription: Grouped by job, each lane tracks copy-thread activity over the recent polling window.
system.threadTimelineUnavailable: Active jobs are reported, but thread-level runtime samples are currently unavailable.
system.threadTimelineEmpty: No thread timeline activity captured in the current window.

system.reconciliationResultsNotAvailable: Reconciliation results are not available. Please run reconciliation from the System page.

system.logsNotConfigured: System logs are unavailable because file-based logging is not configured on the backend.

setup.provisionAlready: Database is already provisioned. Continuing with existing schema.
setup.trustProxyHeadersHelp: Enable only when ECUBE is behind a trusted reverse proxy that sets X-Forwarded-For or X-Real-IP. Leave disabled for direct/native deployments.
setup.adminCreated: Admin user created successfully. Continue to the next step.
setup.adminReconciled: Existing OS admin user reconciled successfully. Continue to the next step.
setup.demoModeSetupManaged: Demo mode setup was completed using the managed demo admin account. Continue to login.
setup.demoModeSetupUnavailable: Demo mode setup could not determine the managed demo admin account. Verify the demo configuration and try again.
setup.alreadyInitialized: Setup is already complete. Please log in.
setup.dockerHostHint: Running inside a container — using the Docker Compose service name as the database host.

configuration.title: Configuration
configuration.description: Update operational runtime settings without shell access. Available to admin and manager roles.

copyProfiles.help: Quick presets bias copy tuning for the expected workload. Apply a preset, then fine-tune the fields below before saving.

log_format.label: Log Format
log_format.help: Use text for human readability or json for structured ingestion.

log_file.label: Log File Path
log_file.help: When unchecked, ECUBE clears LOG_FILE in .env. When checked, values in ECUBE's default log directory are shown by filename only and saved back under /var/log/ecube. Enter a full path to use a different directory.
log_file.readOnlyHelp: Current effective log file name. Managers can view this value here but must use the Admin page to change it.

nfs_client_version.label: Default NFS Client Version
nfs_client_version.help: Preferred NFS protocol version used when a mount does not override it. Lower versions can avoid slow fallback on hosts that do not support NFS 4.2.

network_mount_timeout_seconds.label: Network Mount Timeout (seconds)
network_mount_timeout_seconds.help: Maximum time ECUBE allows SMB or NFS mount workflows to run before they are treated as failed. This setting also applies to related unmount and mount-state verification checks. Increase this for slow file servers, DNS resolution, or authentication handshakes.

mount_share_discovery_timeout_seconds.label: Mount Share Discovery Timeout (seconds)
mount_share_discovery_timeout_seconds.help: Maximum time ECUBE allows SMB share or NFS export discovery to run before it is treated as failed. Increase this for slow file servers or networks.

db_pool_recycle_seconds.label: DB Pool Recycle Seconds
db_pool_recycle_seconds.help: Changes to this value are applied after service restart.

startup_analysis_batch_size.label: Startup Analysis Batch Size
startup_analysis_batch_size.help: Maximum number of startup-analysis rows processed per batch while scanning, persisting, and validating source trees. Allowed range: 1 to 5000. Lower values reduce peak memory usage but increase database round trips.

mkfs_exfat_cluster_size.label: exFAT Cluster Size
mkfs_exfat_cluster_size.help: Allocation unit used when ECUBE formats a drive as exFAT. 4KB is recommended for most situations. Use larger clusters only for drives that will store very large files only and no small files.

drive_format_timeout_seconds.label: Drive Format Timeout (seconds)
drive_format_timeout_seconds.help: Maximum time ECUBE allows a drive format command to run before it is treated as failed. Use a larger value for large media that require extended exFAT formatting time.

drive_mount_timeout_seconds.label: Drive Mount Timeout (seconds)
drive_mount_timeout_seconds.help: Maximum time ECUBE allows a drive mount command to run before it is treated as failed. Increase this for large removable media or slower USB links that need extra time to mount.

copy_job_timeout.label: Per-file Copy Timeout (seconds)
copy_job_timeout.help: Maximum time allowed for one file copy/checksum attempt. Set to 0 to disable timeout enforcement.

copy_chunk_size_bytes.label: Copy Chunk Size
copy_chunk_size_bytes.help: Larger chunks reduce Python loop overhead and use more memory per worker. Larger values help most on large-file workloads.

copy_progress_flush_bytes.label: Progress Flush Threshold
copy_progress_flush_bytes.help: How much copied data the engine buffers before committing progress to the database. Higher values reduce transaction overhead and use more memory.

copy_default_thread_count.label: Default Copy Worker Count
copy_default_thread_count.help: Number of copy workers used when a job does not override thread count. Higher values improve overlap for many small files when the source and target can sustain it.

copy_file_fsync_enabled.label: Force per-file disk sync
copy_file_fsync_enabled.help: When enabled, ECUBE calls fsync() after every copied file. Leave disabled for maximum throughput and rely on restart recovery to resume from the last committed DONE file.

usb_discovery_interval.label: Auto USB Discovery Interval (seconds)
usb_discovery_interval.help: How often ECUBE polls for USB drive changes in the background. Set to 0 to disable polling and enable udev hotplug discovery.

job_detail_files_page_size.label: Job Detail Files Per Page
job_detail_files_page_size.help: Default number of file rows shown per Job Detail page. Minimum 20, maximum 100.

callback_allow_private_ips.label: Allow Private Callback IPs
callback_allow_private_ips.help: When enabled, callback delivery may target private or loopback addresses for controlled lab workflows. Leave disabled for production so HTTP and HTTPS callbacks stay limited to publicly routable destinations.

callback_default_url.label: Default Callback URL
callback_default_url.help: Optional webhook URL used when a job does not define its own callback URL. HTTPS is the recommended default. A job-specific callback URL always overrides this system-wide default.
callback_default_url.insecureConfirmLabel: Allow an insecure HTTP default callback URL for testing only
callback_default_url.insecureHelp: HTTP default callback URLs are for test and lab workflows only. Use HTTPS for normal deployments.
callback_default_url.insecureConfirmationRequired: Select the testing-only confirmation checkbox before saving an HTTP default callback URL.

callback_proxy_url.label: Outbound Callback Proxy URL
callback_proxy_url.help: Optional HTTP or HTTPS forward proxy used for outbound webhook delivery. Leave blank to connect directly.

callback_payload_fields.label: Callback Payload Source Fields
callback_payload_fields.help: Optional JSON array of allowlisted source field names to include in outbound callback payloads. Leave blank to send the default payload.
callback_payload_fields.invalidJson: Callback Payload Source Fields must be valid JSON.
callback_payload_fields.invalidType: Callback Payload Source Fields must be a JSON array.

callback_payload_field_map.label: Callback Payload Field Mapping
callback_payload_field_map.help: Optional JSON object mapping outbound field names to exact source field names or deterministic field-substitution template strings. Leave blank to preserve the selected source field names.
callback_payload_field_map.invalidJson: Callback Payload Field Mapping must be valid JSON.
callback_payload_field_map.invalidType: Callback Payload Field Mapping must be a JSON object.

callback_hmac_secret.label: Webhook Signing Secret
callback_hmac_secret.help: Optional write-only shared secret used to sign callback payloads with the X-ECUBE-Signature header. Leave blank to keep the current secret.
callback_hmac_secret.statusConfigured: A signing secret is currently configured.
callback_hmac_secret.statusNotConfigured: No signing secret is currently configured.

configuration.pendingRestartBody: Some configuration changes are pending and require restarting the ECUBE service.

confirmRestart.title: Restart ECUBE service?
confirmRestart.body: Some configuration changes require restarting the ECUBE service to take effect. Restart now?

passwordPolicy.difok: Minimum characters different from old password
passwordPolicy.enforceForRoot: enforce_for_root is always enforced and cannot be disabled.

toasts.pendingRestart: Changes saved. Restart is required for all updates to take effect.

adminPage.title: Admin
adminPage.description: Manage infrastructure, password policy, webhook, and service-control settings. Admin role required.

serviceControl.idle: Restart the ECUBE service after saving changes that require a restart.

errors.invalidRequest: Invalid request. Please check your input.
errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
errors.insufficientPermissions: Insufficient permissions. Your role may not allow this action.
errors.driveNotProjectBound: Selected drive is not bound to this project. Initialize and bind the drive before selecting it.
errors.requestConflict: Request conflict. Please refresh and try again.
errors.validationFailed: Validation failed. Please review your input.
